Burlington Indivisible

Welcome to Burlington Indivisible. We are a grassroots organization based in Burlington, MA focusing on restricting the reach of ICE and organizing the political action necessary to ensure lasting, systemic change.

The Community Calendar

To support the diverse efforts of all local activists, Burlington Indivisible hosts a central Community Calendar. This hub lists our own events alongside activities hosted by other groups in the area, providing a clear path for anyone looking to get involved.

Events from the different groups and those hosted by Burlington Indivisible include:

  • Protest Standouts: Find various days and times at the 1000 District Ave I.C.E. detention center and Escadrille. Both properties are owned by landlord Bob Murray, and we gather there to demand due process and justice. A special shout-out to BW, whose early actions inspired many others to form and dedicate additional days to these protests.
  • Monthly Letter Writing Campaign: Participate in recurring advocacy and voter engagement to influence policy and representatives.
  • Electoral Action: Opportunities to mobilize for competitive races and support liberal down-ballot candidates to defend the integrity of our vote.

Whether you choose an event hosted by Burlington Indivisible or a standout by another local group, the calendar ensures you have the information you need to take action. We also welcome other causes aligned with the national Indivisible movement.
